prestazioni: Engine swap to TU5JP4 (1.6L 16V, 120hp stock) with forged internals: Wiseco 83mm forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings. Paired with a Garrett GT2860RS turbo (0.63 A/R turbine housing) on a custom tubular manifold by Bell Auto Services, targeting 220whp on E85 with a Syvecs S6Plus standalone ECU.

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (240mm) with a lightweight flywheel (4.5kg), Quaife ATB helical LSD (80% lock), and custom driveshafts by GKN Driveline with CV joints rated for 300Nm. Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (adjustable damping, 30-way rebound, 12-way compression) and polybushings from SuperPro (front control arms, rear trailing arms).

Braking system upgrade: AP Racing 4-piston CP5250 calipers (front) with 280mm two-piece rotors (Floating, slotted) and Ferodo DS2500 pads. Rear converted to 220mm solid rotors with Brembo 08.9754.10 calipers. Braided stainless steel lines by Goodridge and Motul RBF660 brake fluid. Cooling system includes a Setrab 13-row oil cooler (19-row for turbo models) and a Mishimoto aluminum radiator with dual 12" SPAL fans.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Version 3 widebody kit (fiberglass, bolt-on) with custom front splitter and rear diffuser by Maxton Design. Carbon fiber hood (2x2 twill, 900g) from Seibon with integrated NACA ducts for intercooler and oil cooler airflow. Rear wing: custom 3D-printed aluminum duckbill spoiler (18" chord, 3° angle) with adjustable Gurney flap.

Interior stripped and reinforced with a T45 steel roll cage by Custom Cages (8-point, bolt-in, with harness bar). Recaro SRD-E bucket seats (FIA 8855-1999) mounted on custom aluminum sliders. Steering wheel: Momo Prototipo (330mm, suede) with NRG quick-release hub. Gauges: Defi Advance BF (oil pressure, boost, EGT) and AEM X-Series wideband AFR (0-5V output).

Exterior lighting: Hella Rallye 3000 (7", 100W H3) with custom Cibié mounting brackets. Rear: Osram LED tail lights (smoked, sequential turn signals) and Philips D2S HID projectors (5000K) in custom Morimoto housings. Wheels: Work Emotion CR Kiwami (15x8 +15 ET, 4x108 PCD) with Toyo R888R tires (195/45/15). Wheel spacers: H&R 15mm hubcentric (4x108 to 4x100 conversion).
